headline: How Can Visa's Intelligent Commerce Connect Power AI Agents?
summary: V builds the rails for agentic commerce with Intelligent Commerce Connect and powers AI-driven shopping and payments at scale.

headline: FlyHouse Appoints Brian P. Reid as Chief Revenue Officer
summary: FlyHouse, the company redefining the private aviation experience for modern travelers and aircraft owners, today announced the appointment of Brian P. Reid as its first Chief Revenue Officer.

raw.headline: FlyHouse Appoints Brian P. Reid as Chief Revenue Officer
raw.summary: FlyHouse, the company redefining the private aviation experience for modern travelers and aircraft owners, today announced the appointment of Brian P. Reid as its first Chief Revenue Officer.

headline: Clinch Bolsters North American Growth with Appointment of IPG Veteran Melvin Stern as VP
summary: Clinch, the agentic AI platform for omnichannel content orchestration, today announced the appointment of Melvin Stern as Vice President of Growth, strengthening its North American team as brands and agencies seek more integrated ways to connect creative to media.

raw.headline: Clinch Bolsters North American Growth with Appointment of IPG Veteran Melvin Stern as VP
raw.summary: Clinch, the agentic AI platform for omnichannel content orchestration, today announced the appointment of Melvin Stern as Vice President of Growth, strengthening its North American team as brands and agencies seek more integrated ways to connect creative to media.

headline: Delta Premium Gains Squeezed by Fuel Shock
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has successfully transformed into a premium service provider, but its record $14.2 billion Q1 revenue is currently colliding with a massive geopolitical shock.

raw.headline: Delta Premium Gains Squeezed by Fuel Shock
raw.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has successfully transformed into a premium service provider, but its record $14.2 billion Q1 revenue is currently colliding with a massive geopolitical shock.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on American Express, Lowers Price Target to $415
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Donald Fandetti   maintains American Express (NYSE:AXP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $425 to $415.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on American Express, Lowers Price Target to $415
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Donald Fandetti   maintains American Express (NYSE:AXP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $425 to $415.
